title: Modern Data Orchestration with AWS Step Functions
summary: Exploring how to build resilient data pipelines using serverless orchestration patterns on AWS.
content:
Introduction

AWS Step Functions provide a powerful way to coordinate multiple AWS services into serverless workflows...

Why Serverless Orchestration?

  • Cost-effective scalability
  • Reduced operational overhead
  • Built-in error handling
const stepFunctions = new AWS.StepFunctions();

title: Bringing Generative AI to the Enterprise
summary: Lessons learned from implementing production-grade LLM applications in large organizations.
content:
The Challenge

Enterprise AI isn't just about the model; it's about the data, security, and governance...

Security and privacy are paramount when dealing with enterprise data.
